title: STATUS Colorado Double Hot Plate, 2500W White Electric Stove, Stainless Steel, COLORADO1PKB4
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: DOUBLE HOT PLATE WITH DUAL COOKING RINGS: STATUS brings flexibility to compact areas with two stainless steel rings that allow simultaneous boiling or frying, ideal for small kitchens, caravans or shared spaces.
2500W POWER WITH FIVE HEAT SETTINGS: High output and adjustable settings provide precise temperature control—from gentle simmering to rapid boiling—across both cooking zones.
GLOSS WHITE FINISH WITH STAINLESS SURFACE: The smooth, durable surface wipes clean effortlessly, making it ideal for frequent use and tidy presentation in compact cooking areas.
SAFETY-FOCUSED DESIGN WITH OVERHEAT PROTECTION: Integrated overheat protection ensures safer use under high-load conditions, making this appliance worry‑free for daily cooking tasks.
1 METRE POWER CORD FOR VERSATILE PLACEMENT: With a full metre of cable, this hob can be positioned flexibly—even in cramped or awkward locations—without being constrained by plug point proximity.
description: Product Description This Status double hot plate has an easy clean design, it is ideal for cooking with a limited space area. It is portable so you can choose to cook anywhere you like as long as there is a plug socket around. This double hot plate gives your kitchen the added flexibility of two extra burners. Let dishes cook, or just keep them warm for serving, while keeping them out of your way. The hot plates come equipped with full-range dual temperature controls, it's the perfect addition to any cook's collection. Its compact design allows it to be stored away in a cabinet, and is also stylish enough to leave out for everyday use. Box Contains 1 x Status Colorado 2500w Double Hotplate
